'''Pizkoss''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Two months after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], the ''[[Uhumele]]'' stopped there to get a new [[transponder]], and [[Janks]] was taken into custody by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Times 6|''Dark Times'' 6]] {{1st}}
*[[Dark Times 7|''Dark Times'' 7]] {{Mo}}
*[[Dark Times 11|''Dark Times'' 11]] {{Mo}}
*[[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 5|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 5]] {{Mo}}
